title: PortalGunMod
description: Portal‑style traversal for Fabric 1.21.11 with custom sounds, clean visuals, and momentum‑accurate teleportation. Early release—updates coming as the mod evolves.
body:
TikTok -- https://www.tiktok.com/@butterboyrs115                                                
To allow me to keep making mods -- buymeacoffee.com/ButterBoyRS

Portal Gun brings seamless, momentum‑driven portal traversal to Fabric 1.21.11, letting you bend space with precision and style. Fire a blue or orange portal onto any valid solid surface and step through to instantly relocate—your velocity, orientation, and flow preserved exactly as you’d expect. Walls, floors, and ceilings all support portal placement, with smart orientation snapping to keep the two‑block footprint perfectly aligned. Each player maintains their own personal portal pair, ensuring clean, conflict‑free gameplay in multiplayer worlds.

To heighten immersion, the mod includes fully custom sound effects for firing, fizzling, and traveling through portals, giving every action a crisp, satisfying feel.

This release marks a very early launch of the project. Core systems are in place, but the mod will continue to evolve with new features, refinements, and polish over time.

✦ Features & Behavior Authentic portal placement: Blue and orange portals attach to solid, opaque blocks with a 2‑block‑tall footprint on walls or a 2‑block‑wide footprint on floors and ceilings.

True momentum conservation: Jumps, falls, and even projectiles retain their full speed and direction across portals.

Safe exit logic: Automatically nudges players clear of the portal plane to prevent clipping or suffocation, even in tight vertical spaces.

Dynamic portal stability: Portals fizzle with a visual effect if their supporting blocks are broken.

Projectile passthrough: Arrows, snowballs, and other projectiles travel cleanly through portals with preserved velocity.

Intuitive HUD feedback: Reticle arcs show portal readiness and active status while holding the gun.

Instant clearing: Remove your portals at any time with V or /portalgun clear.

Optional grab tool: Press G to lift and hold nearby mobs directly in front of you.

This mod is built for smooth placement, clean visuals, responsive teleportation, and a polished feel—no bulky frames, no complicated setup, just pure portal‑powered movement. And with ongoing updates planned, the experience will only get better from here.
